extensions.name: Vimm's Lair
extensions.author: ConnorBS
extensions.description: Downloads ROMs from Vimm's Lair. Uses headless Chromium (Playwright) to bypass the JS bot challenge. Enforces Vimm's one-download-at-a-time policy automatically.

extensions.name: WowROMs
extensions.author: ConnorBS
extensions.description: Searches WowROMs.com for ROMs. Results may vary depending on bot-protection state.

extensions.name: ROMsFun
extensions.author: ConnorBS
extensions.description: Searches ROMsFun.com for ROMs. May be blocked by Cloudflare bot protection.
